demo_desc: This page validates builtin packs, filesystem external packs, locale switching, installer rescan, and NVM persistence using the current lv_ext_resouce/app_lang/app_comm flow.
demo_preview_line_0: Builtin locales come from multi_language_table.xlsx and are compiled into lang_pack.c.
demo_preview_line_1: External locales come from the same workbook and are generated into /ex/resource/lang/installer/*.bin.
demo_preview_line_2: Tap Rescan after replacing installer .bin to simulate OTA or Bluetooth update of external language packs.
demo_preview_line_3: Switch a locale, reboot, then compare Stored locale and startup language to verify NVM persistence.
demo_status_ready: Ready: builtin locale switch, external installer scan, and NVM display are available.
demo_status_rescan_reload_fmt: Installer rescanned and external locale reloaded: %s
demo_status_dfs_unavailable: Filesystem external language-pack support is unavailable in this build.
